final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing editorial photo of a professional gym scene with an athlete performing a deadlift (any in-image text in Chinese, if rendered).

Style/medium: needs an industrial aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include the athlete performing a deadlift as the focal subject
Subject: must include a muscular athlete with defined muscle lines performing a deadlift
Scene/backdrop: must include a professional gym with industrial-style decor
Lighting/mood: needs a cool-toned lighting atmosphere with masculine energy — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a cool-toned direction — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a sweat and power aesthetic — exact surface treatment is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: if any in-image text is rendered, default to Chinese
Avoid:
